case_title: ELAINE LONG ET AL VS. JONEL PEREZ ABRIGANA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,205.84 FILED BY LONG, ELAINE LONG, COREY AS TO DEFENDANT ABRIGANA, JONEL PEREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED OCT-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABRIGANA, JONEL PEREZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2024 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFFS ELAINE LONG AND PRESENT. DEFENDANT JONEL PEREZ ABRIGANA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-28-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS ELAINE LONG AND COREY LONG ARE PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. *** DEFENDANT JONEL PEREZ ABRIGANA CHECKED-IN LATE AFTER PLAINTIFFS HAD LEFT. *** (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LONG, ELAINE LONG, COREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABRIGANA, JONEL PEREZ $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LONG, ELAINE LONG, COREY
